passing_score_scale: Composite score 1-36 (average of English, Math, Reading, Science). Writing scored separately 2-12.
exam_format: Paper or computer-based; multiple choice + optional writing

testing_centers.notes: National test dates offered at high schools and authorized test centers. PreACT is school-administered only; not available at public test centers.

id_requirements: Photo ID required for ACT on test day. Acceptable forms: school ID, driver's license, passport, or other government-issued photo ID. Name must match registration.
exam_rules: Closed-book. No phones or electronic devices. Approved calculators permitted on Math section only. Photo ID required. No sharing of test content.

retake_policy.notes: Test takers may attempt the ACT up to 12 times. Superscore (highest section scores across sittings) accepted by many colleges. No mandatory waiting period between attempts beyond standard registration windows.

official_study_resources.title: Free ACT Official Practice Tests
official_study_resources.notes: Free official practice tests available on act.org.

official_study_resources.title: The Official ACT Prep Guide
official_study_resources.notes: Official prep book with 8 full-length practice tests.
